summary: Iteration 2 frontend testing of new search/priority/tag filters, monthly Calendar view, and CSV exports. All 7 explicit features verified end-to-end against the live preview URL with a mongosh-injected session. Backend regression smoke (auth/me, GET /tasks, POST /tasks, POST /tasks/{id}/archive, GET /stats) all 200.

minor.issue: User pydantic model requires created_at as str — if a test seeds users.created_at as a BSON Date (not ISO string), backend returns 500. Existing playbook (/app/auth_testing.md) inserts BSON Date and would break. Suggest either coercing datetime in get_current_user or updating the playbook to insert ISO strings.

issues: Uses native browser <input type="date"> (shows 'mm/dd/yyyy' placeholder, locale-dependent format) instead of a shadcn Calendar/Popover component — inconsistent with the rest of the dark-themed UI and the testing guideline that flags 'browser default picker instead of shadcn calendar component'.

design_issues.screen: Calendar day cell '+ to add task'
issues: The per-day add button is hidden via inline style.opacity=0 and only revealed via JS onMouseEnter. Not keyboard/touch accessible and not visible without hover. Consider rendering at low opacity by default or on focus.

verified_features: Kanban: FilterBar visible with search/priority/tag/reset (data-testid=filter-bar, filter-search, filter-priority, filter-tag, filter-reset).
Kanban: Typing 'alpha' filtered cards live (alpha=1, bravo=0). Reset chip cleared filters.
Kanban: Priority=Haute kept only the high-priority card. Tag=bug kept only bravo.

Archives: FilterBar present and Export CSV downloads scrumflow-archive-YYYY-MM-DD.csv with header 'id,title,description,status,priority,start_date,due_date,actual_end_date,tags,parent_id,archived,created_at,updated_at' and contains the archived TEST_charlie row.
Calendar (/calendar): Monthly grid renders Mon-Sun x 6 weeks. Today cell highlighted in orange. Tasks appear in their due_date cell with status color. Prev/Next/Today nav changes the heading.

Calendar: Clicking a task opens the modal in 'Modifier la tâche' mode. Clicking 'Nouvelle tâche' opens modal titled 'Nouvelle tâche' with start_date+due_date pre-filled to today (2026-05-06). Submitting persists; after refresh the task appears on today's cell.
Calendar: Clicking '+' on a future day cell opens 'Nouvelle tâche' with due_date prefilled to that ISO date (e.g. 2026-05-16).
Stats: Export CSV downloads scrumflow-all-YYYY-MM-DD.csv with both active (TEST_alpha, TEST_calendar_created) and archived (TEST_charlie) rows.
TaskModal: With task=null OR task.id=null, title='Nouvelle tâche' and submit calls POST /api/tasks. With task.id set, title='Modifier la tâche' and submit calls PUT.
not_directly_tested: Drag-and-drop after filtering: pointer-event simulation for dnd-kit was not run (same as iter1). Backend PUT /api/tasks/{id} status update was verified via curl smoke; UI integration relies on the same code path.
action_items: Replace native <input type="date"> in TaskModal with a shadcn Calendar/Popover for consistent dark UI and locale-stable format.
Make per-day '+' add button on Calendar visible at low opacity by default (not opacity:0 on inline style) for accessibility/discoverability.

Either coerce non-string datetime values in get_current_user or update /app/auth_testing.md to insert created_at as ISO strings (the current playbook example produces a 500 because it inserts a BSON Date).
critical_code_review_comments: CalendarView.jsx: stubTask is computed but never passed to <TaskModal>; the actual flow relies on initialDate prop instead, so stubTask is dead code (also acknowledged in the inline comment) — remove it to reduce confusion.
TaskModal.jsx: useEffect resets the form on every change of `open`, including when transitioning from open->close, which clears the form just before close animation. Minor, harmless.
FilterBar PRIORITIES list is duplicated with TaskModal PRIORITIES (DRY).

csv.js: tasksToCSV does not BOM-prefix the file; Excel opens UTF-8 CSV with accents (é, à) as garbled. Consider prepending '\ufeff' for better Excel compatibility (low priority — works fine in Numbers/LibreOffice/Sheets).
test_credentials: mongosh-injected: token=iter2b_tok_1778102376460 (cleaned up after run). For future iterations, inject created_at/expires_at as ISO strings (not BSON Date), as backend's User pydantic model expects str.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_* tasks (alpha/bravo active, charlie archived), 1 TEST_calendar_created via UI. All cleaned via DELETE /api/tasks/{id}. Test session also dropped.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use ISO-string dates when seeding via mongosh (user.created_at, session.expires_at, session.created_at) — backend User model is `created_at: str` and BSON Date causes 500 on /api/auth/me. The preview host is backlog-master-4.preview.emergentagent.com; cookie session_token must be set with secure=True, sameSite='None'. Calendar uses initialDate prop on TaskModal; date inputs are native HTML5 (locale: en-US shows mm/dd/yyyy). dnd-kit drag-and-drop in Kanban was not simulated through Playwright pointer events.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in the iteration-2 features. Pre-existing minor issues: (a) auth playbook seeds BSON Date but model expects str — caused initial smoke failure during this run, worked around by re-seeding with ISO strings; (b) date pickers are browser-default and the per-day '+' button has opacity:0 by default — both UX-only, no functional break.
